content.full_text:
FPPC
AUG 2 0 1992
r

30268 Mersey Court
Temecula, CA 92591
August 18, 1992

Deanne Stone, Legal Department,
State of California, FPPC,
PO Box 807,
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Ms. Stone:

I am writing to ask for a written ruling on a possible conflict
of interest that we discussed last week.

The original development project for the new City of Temecula was
owned by Kaiser Development. They in tern sold the land to
Bedford Properties, who have a joint arrangement with Kemper Real
Estate Management Company. Recently Kemper Real Estate Management
Company took exclusive control of the remaining unsold and
undeveloped land, as well as some retail centers.

I am running for the City Council of the City of Temecula and own
Kemper Financial mutual funds. Additionally I control such funds
in an irrevocable trust fund for my mother, Martha Adams a
resident of West Palm Beach, Florida.

I wish to determine whether there would be a conflict, should I
be elected, and had to vote on land use by Kemper Real Estate
Management Company.

Thank you for your help. Should you need to ask me any further
questions please call me at 714-699-4206.

Very truly yours,

R. Jane Vernon

The original development project for the new City of Temecula was owned by Kaiser Development.
